name: GenFlat Holdings, Inc.
business: GenFlat Holdings, Inc. is an early-stage company that developed a collapsible marine container (the GenFlat Container) that can be collapsed and stacked four-to-one to save space. The company operates as a container sales and leasing company, providing the GenFlat Container primarily to shipping line customers under short and long-term lease structures. As of the filing date, the company has one rental agreement and two equipment lease agreements with a total of three customers.

exposures.sentence: We operate as a container sales and leasing company and supply GenFlat’s patented marine container primarily to shipping line customers under a variety of short and long-term lease structures.
Our Company is also in various stages of evaluation with potential customers to lease GenFlat Containers, including shipping lines, retailers, logistics companies, and the United States military.

catalysts.event: Entered into a lease agreement with a customer
catalysts.sentence: Presently, our commercial operations consist of one rental agreement and two equipment lease agreements to provide GenFlat Containers with a total of three customers, including one agreement entered into in August 2025 and one agreement entered into in September 2025.

catalysts.sentence: Presently, our commercial operations consist of one rental agreement and two equipment lease agreements to provide GenFlat Containers with a total of three customers, including one agreement entered into in August 2025 and one agreement entered into in September 2025.

tamClaims.sentence: We intend to answer the $20 billion empty container repositioning problem by helping our customers to save money, optimize space, and reduce carbon emissions.
